commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=0b525136dcbbaa607dc7610b83858315c5010fda)
commands.review_summary:
The branch emits assistant-stream error events for embedded-agent timeout and incomplete-turn terminal paths, adds regression assertions, and adds a sanitized Xinflo OpenAI-compatible stream fixture.

PR surface: Source +126, Tests +99. Total +225 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR-introduced test defect: source inspection shows the local `onAgentEvent` mock shadows the imported subscriber and leaves `stopBus` undefined. The original terminal-error behavior is source-reproducible on current main, but the PR body still lacks a real failure run.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor action is needed for both the broken event-bus test and real behavior proof; automation should not take over because it cannot supply the contributor's real setup evidence.

target.title: fix(agents): surface terminal stream errors
target.body:
## Summary
- Emit terminal timeout and incomplete-turn errors as assistant stream events so live chat surfaces silent terminal failures.
- Keep terminal error events as replacement snapshots instead of append deltas to avoid concatenating stale partial output.
- Add an Xinflo OpenAI-compatible stream fixture for successful chat-completions transport coverage.

## Verification
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/openai-transport-stream.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.timeout-triggered-compaction.test.ts
- .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode commit --commit HEAD

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: terminal agent failures that previously returned an error payload without emitting assistant live text now show visible assistant error text.
Real environment tested: local OpenClaw source checkout in /tmp/openclaw-pr-agent, using the actual OpenClaw CLI entrypoint plus the agent runner path under this PR head.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: node openclaw.mjs --version; node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/openai-transport-stream.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.timeout-triggered-compaction.test.ts
Evidence after fix: Terminal output from the real checkout after this patch:
```text
$ node openclaw.mjs --version
OpenClaw 2026.5.28 (0b52513)
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/openai-transport-stream.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.timeout-triggered-compaction.test.ts
# command exited 0
```
Observed result after fix: The real OpenClaw CLI entrypoint launched from the patched checkout and the targeted agent runner proof command exited 0; tests assert terminal errors emit through both local run callbacks and the global agent event bus without a delta append field.
What was not tested: live provider execution against Xinflo credentials was not run.
target.author: darclindy
